html:
“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.

Can be build up 4 levels.”

-for Structure

The Wood Wall is the third strongest of the four Walls, a craftable Item, and Structure that prevents the player's and Mobs' movement. Once built, it can be repaired or upgraded to a second tier with another piece of Wood Wall or enough Twigs, Logs, or Boards. It can be attacked and destroyed, leaving a destroyed Wood Wall. It is also highly flammable, so measures should be taken when fighting Red Hounds, or during Summer. Using a Hammer on the wall will yield one Log from tier one and two Logs from tier three. It has a maximum of 200 health and begins with 100 health when first built before being upgraded.

Recipe

×2

×8

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Nom de Plume Collection
Walnut Bookstack
The best authors can breathe life into their subjects with but a few well-chosen words.

Trivia

  • Prior to the Moderately Friendly Update, walls could be repaired using healing items, such as the Honey Poultice.

Assets

  • Phase 3 90°
  • Phase 2 90°
  • Phase 1 90°
  • Half Destroyed 90°
  • Destroyed 90°

Gallery

  • Old Wood Wall
  • All Wood Wall tiers.
  • Wood Wall burning during a Hound attack.
  • All types of walls (not including DLC) built next to each other. In order, from outside to inside: Stone Wall, Thulecite Wall, Wood Wall, Hay Wall.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

“Pickets!”
–Wilson, Examining a wood wall item.
“I hate hiding.”
–Willow, Examining a wood wall item.
“Pokey sticks!”
–Wolfgang, Examining a wood wall item.
“Bundled logs.”
–Wendy, Examining a wood wall item.
“WOODEN DEFENSES”
–WX-78, Examining a wood wall item.
“Deployable pickets.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining a wood wall item.
“I like the look of that!”
–Woodie, Examining a wood wall item.
“Pocket-sized wall pieces. Yup.”
–Maxwell, Examining a wood wall item.
“Segment of a wall made from boards and rope.”
–Wagstaff, Examining a wood wall item.
“A mediöcre förtificatiön.”
–Wigfrid, Examining a wood wall item.
“They won't keep us safe if we keep holding them.”
–Webber, Examining a wood wall item.
“Knock on wood this keeps stuff out.”
–Walani, Examining a wood wall item.
“Delivers a rather wooden performance as a wall.”
–Warly, Examining a wood wall item.
“Walls arrr fer land and land be fer lubbers.”
–Woodlegs, Examining a wood wall item.
“TIS FOR WALL”
–Wilba, Examining a wood wall item.
“Friends!”
–Wormwood, Examining a wood wall item.
“A fence should be in the ground. That's 'Fence Building 101'.”
–Wheeler, Examining a wood wall item.
“Assembly time.”
–Winona, Examining a wood wall item.
“It's of no use there on the ground.”
–Wortox, Examining a wood wall item.
“Would look nice with some Pig heads.”
–Wurt, Examining a wood wall item.
“Hope nobody hurts themselves if they try to climb over.”
–Walter, Examining a wood wall item.
“The sooner I can get it built, the better I'll feel.”
–Wanda, Examining a wood wall item.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tường Gỗ là Tường mạnh thứ ba trong bốn Tường, một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được và Cấu trúc ngăn cản chuyển động của người chơi và Mob. Sau khi được xây dựng, nó có thể được sửa chữa hoặc nâng cấp lên tầng thứ hai bằng một mảnh Tường Gỗ khác hoặc đủ Cành Cây, Gỗ hoặc Ván. Nó có thể bị tấn công và phá hủy, để lại một Bức Tường Gỗ bị phá hủy. Nó cũng rất dễ cháy nên cần có biện pháp khi chiến đấu với Chó Săn Đỏ hoặc trong Mùa Hè. Sử dụng Búa lên tường sẽ mang lại một Gỗ từ cấp một và hai Gỗ từ cấp ba. Nó có tối đa 200 máu và bắt đầu với 100 máu khi được chế tạo lần đầu…
